title: Totem
description: Customizable totems to save you from situations so you can make it back in once piece.
body:
## **Version**

Totem is compatible with the following versions \
1.20.4, 1.20.5, 1.20.6

## **Bugs, Feature Requests or Other Issues?**
You can report bugs and more on our discord server

## **Summary**

Totem adds new types of totem of undying into the game that can save you from specific types of death. These totems are fully customizable using configuration files and you can even add more yourself! You can learn more about configuring totem on our [docs page](https://docs.miles.sh/pineapple-plugins/Totem/)!
